3093810.name: AI-VJ - Carnival Visuals
3093810.description:
Adds over 280 carnival themed artistic AI visuals to AI-VJ, from across a wide range of styles!

They're pre-generated for optimum performance, carefully selected and manually tweaked for artistic quality, by an experienced DJ

The visuals are recorded at 60fps, which is double the normal video framerate, to ensure smooth visuals at every BPM. The total unique runtime of all visuals together is over 34 minutes. With some duplicate plays that's standard practice in VJ sets, this package is more than enough for a one to two hour long DJ set.

After installing the DLC you can add these visuals to your deck through the "Visuals DLCs" top menu

(We're happy to let you know that these visuals were created using green energy)
3093810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
